title: Assisted Living Kitchen OS — White Label Partnership
pitch: Owner paying $12K to build it wants to sell to other operators. 15,000+ underserved small operators in the US. Deal structure brief ready. Potential recurring SaaS revenue for Rock Castle.

title: Nashville AI Collective — Quarterly Ticketed Events
pitch: Erik convenes Nashville AI leaders quarterly. Ticketed. Builds authority, pipeline, and community. Phase 4 item but worth designing early.

title: Dowdle Solution as Repeatable Product
pitch: The AI audit + deliverables built for Dowdle can be repackaged and sold to similar commercial contractors. Template already built. Rock Castle's first repeatable offer.

title: Builder's Blueprint as ManyChat Lead Magnet
pitch: 12-section framework written and reviewed. Needs PDF formatting then ManyChat activation. EBB primary lead magnet. April 1 build date.

title: Pre-Recorded CTA Commercials for The Build Show
pitch: 30-60 second product spots Erik records once — Builders Society, Rock Castle audit, TTH — triggered mid-show with a button press in OBS. Phase 2 item after show rhythm is established.
